headline: Shares of precious metals-related companies are trading higher amid a rebound in gold and silver prices. Also, concerns over prolonged elevated energy prices may help drive inflation hedging.

headline: Is Trending Stock Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (FCX) a Buy Now?
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Freeport-McMoRan, Lowers Price Target to $66
summary: UBS  analyst Daniel Major   maintains Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $70 to $66.
